folio.label: 88v
folio.l: Whan they for soules , seyn the psalme of Dauyd
Loo ; buf they seyn , Cor meum eructauit
Who folwetú Cristes gospel , and here fore
But we that humble ben , and chaast and poore
Werkers of goddis word , nat auditours
Therfore rigút as an hauke , vp on a sours
Vp spryngetú in to the Eyr , rigút so preyeres
Of charitable and chaast , bisy freres
Maken here souressourssoures , to goddis Eres twoo233There is a little line in the left margin, which indicates the line with the correction, same ink.ODR
Thomas Thomas , so mot I ride or goo
And be that lord , that cleped is Seynt Iue
Nere thow oure brother , shuldest æè neuäe thryue
In oure chapitre , preye we day and nygút
To Crist , that he sende the , hele and mygút
Thy body , for to welden hastily
God wot q¶ he , no thyngö ther of fele I
As helpe me god , as I in fewe ©eres
Haue spended , vp on many dyuers freres
Ful many a pound , ©et fare I neuäe the bette
Certeyn my good , haue I almost bysette
Fare wel my gold , for it is al a go
The frere answered , o Thoms dost æè so
What nedetú the , dyuerse freres seche
What nedetú hi~ , that hatú a parfyt leche
To sechen othere leches , in tovne
ñoure inconstaunce , is ©oure confusione
Holde ©e thanne me , and eke al oure couent
To preye for ©ow , be insufficient
Thomas that iape , is nat wortú a myte
ñoure maladye is , for we han to lyte
A , ©eue that Couent foure and twenty grotes
A , ©eue that Couent , half a quarter Otes
A , ©eue that Frere , a peny and lat hi~ goo
Nay nay Thomas , it may no thyngö be soo
What is a ferthyngö , wortú , parted on twelue
Loo § ecú thyngö that is oned , in hi~ selue

note.notetxt: note: compare this Loo § half puntos elevatos with the one in the GP. Double check policy/ODR/

folio.l: Is more strongö , than whan it is I skatered
Thomas of me , thow shalt nat ben I flatered
Thow woldest han oure labour , half for nougút
The heye god , that al this world hatú wrougút
Seitú that the werkman , is wortú his hyre
Thomas nat of ©oure tresore , I desire
As for my selue , but that al oure Couent
To preye for ©ow , ben ay so diligent
And for to holden , Cristes owen chirche
Thomas if ©e wyln lerne , for to werche
Of beldynge , vp on chirches , may ©e fynde
